{{Quote|Where is Gunray? Where is Haako? A third-tier flunky has no right to negotiate on the Trade Federation's behalf. We have our battleships. We have our droids. If Palpatine wants our wealth, let him come and take it.|Marath Vooro|<ref name="holo">{{InsiderCite|84|Republic HoloNet News Special Inaugural Edition 16:5:241}}</ref>}}
'''Marath Vooro''' of [[Enarc/Legends|Enarc]] was [[Customs Vizier]] of the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] at the time of the formation of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==Biography==
Vooro was vocally against [[Sentepeth Findos]]' [[Imperial–Trade Federation treaty|treaty]] with the [[New Order/Legends|New Order]], and warned that [[Enarc/Legends|Enarc]] would resist with due force against the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]].<ref name="holo" /> Because of this, he also gained control of a remaining portion of the [[Trade Defense Force]], and its droid forces, at [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]]. He had some support from [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] sympathizers and [[Separatist holdouts/Legends|holdouts]], but ultimately he lost due to both incompetent [[Officer/Legends|officers]] and a large percentage of his fleet being [[Battle of Farstine|decimated]] at [[Farstine]] by a fleet led by [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Octavian Grant]]. However, Vooro was later [[Battle of the Hook Nebula|captured]] at the [[Hook Nebula/Legends|Hook Nebula]].<ref name="TEGtW" />
